title: calea oxylepis
intro: Calea oxylepis, also known as Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Calea oxylepis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Calea oxylepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
